title: VoiceCommands
description: Source Engine style voice command menu system to quickly send chat binds
body:
A mod that adds a Source Engine style voice command menu system to send commands and chat messages. Think of it as a chat bind system.

![popup menu showing the list of available voice commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34f9f4d2659830dd436c750d610ff2e36b176e9b.png)

The default values mimic those present in *Team Fortress 2*, but are entirely customizable.

Similar to how it works in TF2, you first open the menu to view the list of commands, and then use your hotbar slot keybinds to select the command to run.
For consistency, selecting a command does not change your currently selected slot. This behavior can be disabled in the options.


## Features
- Customizable chat messages
  - All commands present in the menus can be customized from the message sent to the shorthand message that appears on the menu itself.
- Custom user defined message prefix
  - You can define a global prefix to use for all menus, or define an override per each menu
  - Supports commands, if the prefix starts with a `/`, it'll be sent as a command
  - Additionally, each individual entry can be configured to run a different command

![demonstration of adding a custom chat prefix to the first voice menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc82af93ebcc27899acb806155e5258ff7605f1.gif)

![demonstration of the first voice menu by opening it and running the second voice command to send a "Thanks" message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ca82e0be118c7433bf2c8e385147361e63842ad.gif)

## Keybinds
|Key(s)|Action|
|-|-|
|Z, X, C|Open Voice Menu 1-3|
|Hotbar Slot 1-9|Issue voice command|
|F8|Open Mod options screen|
